arts.ttl: Liverpool trio return from injury as Slot names starting XI vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Liverpool have been boosted by the return of Diogo Jota, Darwin Nunez and Curtis Jones from injury as Arne Slot named a strong starting XI to face Bournemouth on Saturday.
